# Dealroom — LLM Context

> Dealroom is a two-party asynchronous contract negotiation platform built by TODO.LAW. It replaces emailing Word files back and forth with a secure, AI-powered workspace that finds the optimal compromise for both parties.

## Public Pages

- [Homepage](https://dealroom.todo.law): Platform overview, feature descriptions, how it works
- [Documentation Hub](https://dealroom.todo.law/docs): Full platform documentation
- [How It Works](https://dealroom.todo.law/docs/how-it-works): Step-by-step negotiation workflow
- [Compromise Algorithm](https://dealroom.todo.law/docs/compromise): Weighted compromise methodology
- [Contract Skills](https://dealroom.todo.law/docs/skills): Supported contract types and templates
- [Supervision Mode](https://dealroom.todo.law/docs/supervision): Human oversight for AI-assisted negotiation
- [Vetting](https://dealroom.todo.law/docs/vetting): Counterparty vetting and due diligence
- [Agent API](https://dealroom.todo.law/docs/agent-api): A2A agent integration documentation
- [Agent Preparation](https://dealroom.todo.law/docs/agent-preparation): Guide for preparing agents for contract negotiation and dispute resolution
- [Local Deployment](https://dealroom.todo.law/docs/local-deployment): Self-hosted deployment guide
- [Marketplace](https://dealroom.todo.law/marketplace): Browse and subscribe to contract skills

## What Dealroom Does

- **Two-Party Negotiation**: Asynchronous contract negotiation between two parties on a shared, encrypted workspace
- **AI-Powered Compromise**: Weighted algorithm that suggests optimal middle ground between competing positions
- **End-to-End Encryption**: All contract data encrypted in transit and at rest
- **Cross-Border Ready**: Supports California, England & Wales, and Spain jurisdictions
- **Contract Types**: 32 contract skills including NDA, MSA, SaaS Agreement, DPA, Privacy Notice, Joint Venture, Employment, Consulting, and more
- **Export & Sign**: Generate final documents for signing after negotiation completes
- **A2A Agent Protocol**: Machine-readable agent card at /.well-known/agent.json for agent-to-agent negotiation

## TODO.LAW Ecosystem

Dealroom is part of the TODO.LAW platform for AI-native legal services:

- **Dealroom** (dealroom.todo.law) — Contract negotiation
- **DPO Central** (dpocentral.todo.law) — Privacy compliance management
- **AI Sentinel** (aisentinel.todo.law) — AI governance and EU AI Act compliance
- **Seneca** (seneca.todo.law) — Privacy litigation research
- **Vendor.Watch** (vendor.watch) — SaaS vendor compliance database
- **Clausemaster** (clausemaster.todo.law) — AI-powered contract analysis
- **Gavel** (gavel.todo.law) — Digital arbitration protocol

For full ecosystem context, see: https://todo.law/llms-full.txt
